titleEn: Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky
summaryAm: ፀሐይ፣ ጨረቃ እና ውሃ ስለ ቦታ፣ ጓደኝነት እና የተፈጥሮ ድንቅ የሚያስተምሩበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ጓደኝነት ቦታን ሲያከብር ሁሉም በራሱ ቦታ ይበራል።

source.name: Traditional African folktale
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ በምድር ላይ ቆንጆ ቤት ነበራቸው።
pages.textEn: Page 1 of Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 1: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ በምድር ላይ ቆንጆ ቤት ነበራቸው።

pages.textAm: ጓደኛቸው ውሃ ሊጎበኛቸው ፈለገ፣ ግን “ቦታ ብዙ ያስፈልገኛል” አለ።
pages.textEn: Page 2 of Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 2: ጓደኛቸው ውሃ ሊጎበኛቸው ፈለገ፣ ግን “ቦታ ብዙ ያስፈልገኛል” አለ።

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ቤታቸውን አሰፉ፣ በሮችንም ከፈቱ።
pages.textEn: Page 3 of Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 3: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ቤታቸውን አሰፉ፣ በሮችንም ከፈቱ።

pages.textAm: ውሃ በደስታ ገባ፣ ግን ቤቱን ሁሉ በቀስታ ሞላው።
pages.textEn: Page 4 of Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 4: ውሃ በደስታ ገባ፣ ግን ቤቱን ሁሉ በቀስታ ሞላው።

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ወደ ላይ ተነሱ እና በሰማይ ሰፊ ቦታ አገኙ።
pages.textEn: Page 5 of Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 5: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ወደ ላይ ተነሱ እና በሰማይ ሰፊ ቦታ አገኙ።

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን ጀምሮ ፀሐይ በቀን፣ ጨረቃም በሌሊት ለጓደኞቻቸው ይበራሉ።
pages.textEn: Page 6 of Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 6: ከዚያ ቀን ጀምሮ ፀሐይ በቀን፣ ጨረቃም በሌሊት ለጓደኞቻቸው ይበራሉ።
